hero.description: I'm Yayan. I build management information systems, web apps, and mobile applications — from Banten for clients across Indonesia.
capabilities.title: Core Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Three pillars that define our engineering focus — from consultation to delivery.
capabilities.web.title: Web Development
capabilities.web.description: Management information systems, government dashboards, internal portals, and web-based business apps. Built with Laravel, clean architecture, and high performance.
capabilities.mobile.title: Mobile App
capabilities.mobile.description: Native and hybrid Android & iOS applications. Field reporting apps, consumer platforms, backed by solid APIs and responsive UIs.
capabilities.maintenance.title: Maintenance System
capabilities.maintenance.description: Server upkeep, database optimization, security patches, and ongoing feature development. We keep your systems stable and relevant.
portfolio.title: Selected Works
portfolio.subtitle: Brief case studies from projects we've shipped to production.
portfolio.error.title: Failed to Load Data
portfolio.error.description: Unable to reach the portfolio database. Please try again.
why-us.title: Why Choose Us
why-us.subtitle: Three reasons our approach differs from most service providers.
why-us.custom.title: 100% Custom Engineering
why-us.custom.description: No instant templates. Every feature, every module, is written from scratch to fit your needs. No bloatware, no dead code.
why-us.pricing.title: Fair Pricing, No Forced Subscriptions
why-us.pricing.description: Pay per scope of work. No monthly subscription traps, no contract lock-in. The final product is entirely yours.
why-us.support.title: Local Support, National Standards
why-us.support.description: Based in Banten. Fast response via WhatsApp. Deep understanding of Indonesian government administration and regulatory requirements.
